scenario: Implement a deterministic benchmark change in a Python repository without introducing autonomous runtime behavior.

tasks.title: Inspect existing replay benchmark structure
tasks.details: Locate paper replay runner, metric tests, artifact schema, and documentation conventions before adding any new benchmark files.

tasks.title: Add typed agent trace replay runner
tasks.details: Extract operational workflow state from checked-in JSON traces, compact it, replay it, and derive deterministic continuity metrics.

tasks.title: Generate stable CI artifact
tasks.details: Write pretty sorted JSON to artifacts/agent_trace_replay_results.json for reviewable benchmark diffs.

decisions: Reuse pytest fixture style from paper replay benchmark.
Represent replay state as normalized JSON primitives only.
Keep all validation deterministic and derived from exact operational fields.
constraints: Do not add embeddings or semantic similarity.
Do not call external APIs during benchmark generation.
Keep implementation typed, lightweight, deterministic, and CI-friendly.
Use fixed precision with at most six decimal places for all metric outputs.
failures: Initial implementation risk: compact schema could accidentally preserve transcript-shaped noise instead of operational state.
recoveries: Limit compact representation to active task, constraints, architecture nodes, dependencies, tool sequence, blockers, deployment requirements, and recovery actions.
Validate no operational field is empty before writing artifact.

architecture_references.role: deterministic extraction, compaction, replay, and metrics

deployment_requirements: Python standard library only for benchmark runner.
Benchmark must run under pytest in cloud CI.
Artifact serialization must be sorted, pretty printed, and newline terminated.
unresolved_blockers: Confirm full repository pytest suite remains green after adding benchmark.
Confirm generated artifact is committed with stable ordering.

dependencies.detail: Runner follows existing replay benchmark conventions.
Artifact generation depends on replay metric output.

transcript_noise: The developer discussed naming options, line wrapping preferences, and unrelated UI copy that must not be necessary for replay continuity.
